creator: SeriousTom@gmail.com
text:
I can only get to the install choices and after no matter which option for installing will run for a bit and I have the same exact problem with PC-BSD.
I've tried version 7 and 7.01 of PC-BSD so I thought I would try FreeBSD and still the same exact problem. I posted in their forum here :
http://forums.pcbsd.org/viewtopic.php?f=2&t=12559
I attached the summary of Everest running on Windows Vista Ultimate 64 just to list some hardware.
I don't understand the problem, the last entry before reboot is :
cpuid=0
uptime=1s
and then the automatic reboot in 15 secs, press any key on the console to cancel.
